stages.description: Discover devices per site with core identity attributes

manualReview.notes: All pluginCalls reviewed. sampleResponse filled from production Mist API. Added 6 production-aligned endpoints (CALL-014..019).

customerData.responseNotes: Sample response for listInstallerSites collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for getSiteWirelessClientStats collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for countOrgSwOrGwPorts collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for getOrgNetworkTemplate collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for listOrgAvailableDeviceVersions collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for getOrgSettings collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for countOrgWirelessClientsSessions collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for getOrgInventory collected from production Mist API.
Returns XML, not JSON. Included for completeness.

sampleResponse.responseNotes: This endpoint returns XML (SAML metadata), not JSON.

review.notes: Low-confidence match: SAML XML endpoint. Plugin mapping (ifStatus) unlikely to be useful.

customerData.responseNotes: Sample response for getSiteAllClientsStatsByDevice collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for getSiteStats collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for listSiteUnconnectedClientStats collected from production Mist API.
Sample response for showSiteDeviceForwardingTable collected from production Mist API.

review.notes: Primary org discovery. Production get_self() extracts privileges[].org_id.

customerData.responseNotes: Returns user profile with privileges array containing all accessible organizations.

review.notes: Core device stats. Production get_organization_devices(). Identity + cpu_stat + memory_stat + module_stat + if_stat.

customerData.responseNotes: Array of device stat objects. Called per type (switch, ap, gateway). Fields: cpu_stat.idle, memory_stat.total/free, module_stat[].fans/temperatures/psus, if_stat.{port}.{counters}.

review.notes: MxEdge stats. Production get_edges_stats(). tunterm_ip_config, memory_stat, service_stat for edge appliances.

customerData.responseNotes: MxEdge appliance stats. Has tunterm_ip_config.ip, oob_ip_config.ip, memory_stat.total/free, service_stat.tunterm.uptime.

review.notes: Port-level stats with LLDP. Production get_mist_intf(). Paginated results[].

customerData.responseNotes: Paginated search results. Each result: port_id, port_mac, mac (switch), speed, up, neighbor_*, tx/rx counters.

review.notes: Device search with LLDP. Production get_device_lldp(). lldp_stat for neighbor discovery.

customerData.responseNotes: Paginated results with lldp_stat (neighbor details by port). Used by obtainLldpAP().

review.notes: Wireless client stats per site. Production get_endhosts(). mac, ip, hostname, vlan for endpoint visibility.

customerData.responseNotes: Array of client stat objects per site. mac, ip, hostname, vlan, ssid, band, rssi, snr, ap_mac, manufacture, model, os.
